bottom_line: Tighten workflow scope and prompt contracts so parser-related backend changes do not trigger avoidable review failures and late diff-coverage churn.
coverage_notes: DB telemetry available (db-identity check: UP). Read all item logs in ai-dev/logs/ (all <1MB; no tail/head sampling needed). Evidence anchored primarily in run/fix logs, with step reports treated as secondary only.

findings.title: Scope contract mismatch caused avoidable review/fix churn
findings.recommendation: Update workflow/prompt templates so backend steps that change parser behavior can include tightly-coupled tests (or S02 can auto-tolerate that diff class when design ACs demand it).
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00118_S02_run1.log:88 — 'Reason for fail: S01 included an out-of-scope test-file modification'
ai-dev/logs/I-00118_S05_fix1.log:37 — 'Global review failed: make test-unit is red...'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Align backend/review scope rules so parser-behavior changes can carry required tests without forced fail/fix loops; analyzed in I-00118 (see ai-dev/work/I-00118/reports/I-00118_self_assess_report.md). Target file: templates/design/Issue_Design_Template.md. Effort: M.

findings.title: Diff-coverage regression surfaced too late in pipeline
findings.recommendation: Add an earlier changed-lines coverage precheck after Tests/final review to detect under-covered touched lines before QV S12.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00118_S12_run1.log:915 — 'Failed I-00118 step S12: diff-coverage failed: exit=2'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add an earlier diff-coverage precheck before late QV gates so low coverage on touched lines fails sooner; analyzed in I-00118 (see ai-dev/work/I-00118/reports/I-00118_self_assess_report.md). Target file: orch/daemon/batch_manager.py. Effort: M.

findings.title: Expected live-DB guard tracebacks produce recurring noisy warnings
findings.recommendation: Filter or mark known expected LiveDbConnectionRefusedError thread exceptions in integration tests that intentionally exercise the guard path.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00118_S11_run1.log:3490 — 'LiveDbConnectionRefusedError: Connection to live orch DB refused...'
ai-dev/logs/I-00118_S11_run2.log:3566 — 'LiveDbConnectionRefusedError: Connection to live orch DB refused...'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Reduce recurring noisy expected LiveDbConnectionRefusedError traceback output in integration runs while preserving guard coverage; analyzed in I-00118 (see ai-dev/work/I-00118/reports/I-00118_self_assess_report.md). Target file: tests/integration/test_oss_dashboard_routes.py. Effort: S.
